_meta.mode: READ-ONLY snapshot — nothing modified on the live store

_notExposedByMcp.paymentMethods: NOT returned by the MCP get_store_profile tool (trimmed profile). Prior verified-from-storefront: PayPal, PayPal Pay-in-3, Debit/Credit Card via Stripe, offline methods. Apple/Google Pay unconfirmed.
_notExposedByMcp.shippingMethods: NOT returned by MCP. Prior verified-from-storefront: GLS, Printful (print-on-demand merch), Packlink PRO.
_notExposedByMcp.taxConfig: NOT returned by MCP. Italy store, EUR. VAT rate and price-inclusivity NOT retrievable via MCP — confirm in Ecwid admin. Product records DO carry a per-product `tax` object (see 02-products-raw.json).
_notExposedByMcp.merchantCenterFeedUrl: NOT exposed by MCP (configured inside Ecwid admin > Channels > Sell on Google). Prior docs cite Merchant Center account 205141206.
_notExposedByMcp.facebookFeedUrl: NOT exposed by MCP (configured inside Ecwid admin > Channels > Meta).
_notExposedByMcp.timezone: NOT returned by the MCP profile tool.
_notExposedByMcp.note: These are tool-scope limitations, not auth failures. read_store_profile scope IS present. Do not treat as missing store config.
